sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Container, Typography, Grid, Paper, Box, Tabs, Tab, Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableContainer, TableHead, TableRow, Chip } from '@mui/material'; import Navbar from '../common/Navbar'; import axios from 'axios'; function RectorDashboard() { const [tab, setTab] = useState(0); const [statistics, setStatistics] = useState(null); const [colleges, setColleges] = useState([]); const [faculties, setFaculties] = useState([]); const [departments, setDepartments] = useState([]); const [courses, setCourses] = useState([]); const [instructors, setInstructors] = useState([]); const [students, setStudents] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { loadAllData(); }, []); const loadAllData = async () => { try { const [statsRes, collegesRes, facultiesRes, departmentsRes, coursesRes, instructorsRes, studentsRes] = await Promise.all([ axios.get('http://localhost:8080/api/statistics'), axios.get('http://localhost:8080/api/colleges'), axios.get('http://localhost:8080/api/faculties'), axios.get('http://localhost:8080/api/departments'), axios.get('http://localhost:8080/api/courses'), axios.get('http://localhost:8080/api/instructors'), axios.get('http://localhost:8080/api/students') ]); setStatistics(statsRes.data); setColleges(collegesRes.data.filter(item => typeof item === 'object' && item !== null)); setFaculties(facultiesRes.data.filter(item => typeof item === 'object' && item !== null)); setDepartments(departmentsRes.data.filter(item => typeof item === 'object' && item !== null)); setCourses(coursesRes.data.filter(item => typeof item === 'object' && item !== null)); setInstructors(instructorsRes.data.filter(item => typeof item === 'object' && item !== null)); setStudents(studentsRes.data.filter(item => typeof item === 'object' && item !== null)); } catch (error) { console.error('Error loading data:', error); } }; return ( <> Ректорски панел setTab(newValue)} sx={{ mb: 3 }}> {tab === 0 && ( Студенти {statistics?.totalStudents || 0} Преподаватели {statistics?.totalInstructors || 0} Курсове {statistics?.totalCourses || 0} Катедри {statistics?.totalDepartments || 0} Факултети {statistics?.totalFaculties || 0} Средна оценка {statistics?.averageGrade?.toFixed(2) || '0.00'} )} {tab === 1 && ( Колежи ID Име Адрес {colleges.map((college) => ( {college.id} {college.name} {college.address} ))}
)} {tab === 2 && ( Факултети ID Име Описание Колеж {faculties.map((faculty) => ( {faculty.id} {faculty.name} {faculty.description} {faculty.college?.name} ))}
)} {tab === 3 && ( Катедри ID Име Описание Факултет {departments.map((department) => ( {department.id} {department.name} {department.description} {department.faculty?.name} ))}
)} {tab === 4 && ( Курсове Код Име Кредити Семестър Преподавател Катедра Студенти {courses.map((course) => ( {course.code} {course.name} {course.credits} {course.semester} {course.instructor?.user?.firstName} {course.instructor?.user?.lastName} {course.department?.name} {course.students?.length || 0} ))}
)} {tab === 5 && ( Преподаватели ID Име Email Катедра Квалификации {instructors.map((instructor) => ( {instructor.id} {instructor.user?.firstName} {instructor.user?.lastName} {instructor.user?.email} {instructor.department?.name} {instructor.qualifications?.map((qual, idx) => ( ))} ))}
)} {tab === 6 && ( Студенти Факултетен № Име Email Специалност Дата на записване {students.map((student) => ( {student.studentNumber} {student.user?.firstName} {student.user?.lastName} {student.user?.email} {student.major} {new Date(student.enrollmentDate).toLocaleDateString('bg-BG')} ))}
)} ); } export default RectorDashboard;
